message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor "CenterCoordinator" as CenterCoordinator
participant "DataFromLegacySystemUI" as DataFromLegacySystemUI
participant "DataFromLegacySystemController" as DataFromLegacySystemController
participant ":ReadLegacyDataFile" as ReadLegacyDataFile
participant ":Company" as Company
participant ":SNSUserStore" as SNSUserStore
participant ":App" as App
participant ":VaccinationCenter" as VaccinationCenter
participant ":Arrival" as Arrival
participant ":Departure" as Departure
participant ":vaccinationCentersStore" as vaccinationCentersStore

== 1 Asks to load a CSV file with legacy data ==
CenterCoordinator -> DataFromLegacySystemUI: 1 Asks to load a CSV file with legacy data
DataFromLegacySystemUI -> DataFromLegacySystemController: 2 DataFromLegacySystemController()
DataFromLegacySystemController -> Company: 3 getVaccinationCentersStore()
Company -> DataFromLegacySystemController: 4 returns the store
DataFromLegacySystemController -> vaccinationCentersStore: 5 getVaccinationCenterAssociatedToCoordinator(id)
vaccinationCentersStore -> DataFromLegacySystemController: 6 returns the vaccination center
DataFromLegacySystemController -> ReadLegacyDataFile: 7 ReadLegacyDataFile(center)
ReadLegacyDataFile -> CenterCoordinator: 8 request path of the CSV file
CenterCoordinator -> DataFromLegacySystemUI: 9 types path
DataFromLegacySystemUI -> DataFromLegacySystemController: 10 readFile(path)
DataFromLegacySystemController -> ReadLegacyDataFile: 11 readFile(String path)

loop while csv has new lines
    ReadLegacyDataFile -> ReadLegacyDataFile: 12 validateFileLegacy(SNSUserNumber, firstDate, secondDate, thirdDate, fourthDate)
    ReadLegacyDataFile -> ReadLegacyDataFile: 13 Saves data into an ArrayList<String> called legacyDataList
end

ReadLegacyDataFile -> SNSUserStore: 14 getSNSUserList()
SNSUserStore -> SNSUserStore: 15 getSNSUserList()
SNSUserStore -> ReadLegacyDataFile: 16 returns list
ReadLegacyDataFile -> DataFromLegacySystemController: 17 returns list
DataFromLegacySystemController -> Company: 18 getVaccineList()
Company -> DataFromLegacySystemController: 19 returns list

loop while legacyDataList has new lines
    ReadLegacyDataFile -> ReadLegacyDataFile: 20 findPosOfSNSUserInSNSUserList, values, positionInSNSUserList
    ReadLegacyDataFile -> ReadLegacyDataFile: 21 findPosOfVaxInVaccineList, values, positionInVaccinesList
    ReadLegacyDataFile -> ReadLegacyDataFile: 22 checksDuplicates(updatedList, snsUsersList, vaccineList, positionInSNSUserList, positionInVaccinesList, lineOfTheData)
    ReadLegacyDataFile -> ReadLegacyDataFile: 23 Saves data into an ArrayList<String> called updatedList
    ReadLegacyDataFile -> App: 24 createArrival()
    App -> Arrival: 25 createArrival()
    Arrival -> App: 26 returns Arrival
    App -> App: 27 Saves arrival into List<Arrival> called arrivalsList
    App -> App: 28 genericsArrivals.binaryFileWrite(Constants.FILE_PATH_ARRIVALS, arrivalsList)
    ReadLegacyDataFile -> App: 29 createDeparture()
    App -> Departure: 30 createDeparture()
    Departure -> App: 31 returns departure
    App -> App: 32 Saves departure into List<Departure> called departuresList
    App -> App: 33 genericsDeparture.binaryFileWrite(Constants.FILE_PATH_DEPARTURES, departuresList)
end

ReadLegacyDataFile -> DataFromLegacySystemController: 34 returns updatedList
DataFromLegacySystemController -> DataFromLegacySystemUI: 35 returns updatedList
DataFromLegacySystemUI -> CenterCoordinator: 36 requests the option to sort
CenterCoordinator -> DataFromLegacySystemUI: 37 selects option
DataFromLegacySystemUI -> DataFromLegacySystemController: 38 chooseCriteriaToSort(option)
DataFromLegacySystemController -> ReadLegacyDataFile: 39 setListOption()

loop while updatedList has new lines
    ReadLegacyDataFile -> ReadLegacyDataFile: 40 Saves dates to a List<LocalDateTime> called listToSort
end

ReadLegacyDataFile -> DataFromLegacySystemController: 41 requests the order of the sort
DataFromLegacySystemController -> DataFromLegacySystemUI: 42 selects order
DataFromLegacySystemUI -> CenterCoordinator: 43 getAlgorithm()
CenterCoordinator -> DataFromLegacySystemUI: 44 getSortingAlgorithm()
DataFromLegacySystemUI -> DataFromLegacySystemController: 45 returns algorithm
DataFromLegacySystemController -> DataFromLegacySystemUI: 46 returns algorithm
DataFromLegacySystemUI -> DataFromLegacySystemController: 47 sortListWithAlgorithmAlgorithmToBeUsed(option)
note right of DataFromLegacySystemController: algorithmToBeUsed can be InsertionSort or HeapSort, both have methods that can sort in ascending/descending order, here we are just representing the InsertionSort algorithm because HeapSort functions in a similar way.
DataFromLegacySystemController -> DataFromLegacySystemController: 48 insertionSortAscending()
DataFromLegacySystemController -> DataFromLegacySystemUI: 49 returns sortedList
DataFromLegacySystemUI -> DataFromLegacySystemController: 50 returns sortedList
DataFromLegacySystemController -> DataFromLegacySystemUI: 51 prints sortedList

alt algorithmToBeUsed = "InsertionSort", option = "0 - Ascending"
    DataFromLegacySystemUI -> CenterCoordinator: 52 selects order
    CenterCoordinator -> DataFromLegacySystemUI: 53 getAlgorithm()
    DataFromLegacySystemUI -> DataFromLegacySystemController: 54 getSortingAlgorithm()
    DataFromLegacySystemController -> DataFromLegacySystemUI: 55 returns algorithm
    DataFromLegacySystemUI -> DataFromLegacySystemController: 56 returns algorithm
    DataFromLegacySystemController -> DataFromLegacySystemUI: 57 sortListWithAlgorithmAlgorithmToBeUsed(option)
    DataFromLegacySystemController -> DataFromLegacySystemController: 58 insertionSortDescending()
    DataFromLegacySystemController -> DataFromLegacySystemUI: 59 returns sortedList
    DataFromLegacySystemUI -> DataFromLegacySystemController: 60 returns sortedList
    DataFromLegacySystemController -> DataFromLegacySystemUI: 61 prints sortedList
else algorithmToBeUsed = "InsertionSort", option = "1 - Descending"
end

@enduml
```
